{{Quote|The sat'skar is probably the hardest to find of any Ekkar Arms products. Sat'skars take so long to make and have such craftsmanship in them that they are reserved for the warriors of their world rather than allowing offworlders access to them.|Dr.Itlar|<ref name="GFT" />}}
The '''sat'skar''' was a traditional type of [[Sword/Legends|sword]] made by the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynites]]. Due to its bulk, this great serrated blade could only be wielded effectively using two hands, to devastating effect. Attempts to wield it single-handedly proved clumsy and ineffective to all but the most skilled warriors.

[[Mlatar Thon Gra]] used a Sat'skar as one of the three constituent parts of [[Cene Gilvent]]'s customized weapon, the [[Soknar]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
